name: Party Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
BRINE SOLUTION:
1. Peel the shrimp and devein them if desired.
2. In a large nonreactive pot, dissolve salt in boiling water.
3. Add cold water and ensure all salt is dissolved; add ice cubes if needed on very hot days.
4. Add shrimp and let stand for 45 minutes (no longer).
5. Drain and rinse under cold running water.
POACHING WATER:
1. Rinse the pot.
2. Place poaching ingredients in the pot and bring to a boil.
3. Boil hard for 5 minutes, then stir in shrimp and lower heat so they simmer gently.
4. Cook shrimp for 3-5 minutes until pink and curled.
5. Drain, dry with paper towels if needed, and refrigerate.
SAUCE:
1. In a medium nonreactive saucepan, combine tomato puree, brown sugar, garlic, lime juice, rind, and cayenne; bring to a boil, stirring frequently.
2. Dissolve cornstarch in water.
3. When boiling, stir in the cornstarch-water mixture.
4. Cook until slightly thickened (it will thicken more as it cools).
5. Remove from heat, cool completely, add cilantro, cover, and chill until ready to serve.
